creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
@Jan Is the current port version broken (build or run) with 3.11? If so please precede this version update with a USES=python:-3.10 version spec cap in main/quarterly to fix the version support

Also, 1.10.0 fixes a security vulnerability in versions <= 1.9.0 [1], so we'll need to update to that version first and merge.

Confirming that the port passes QA (upstream test suite) would be great too.

[1] https://github.com/pytest-dev/py/blob/1.11.0/CHANGELOG.rst
